modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Touchscreen pen on laptop not responding

full_description_text:  
Hey, so my touchscreen pen isn’t working at all. I’ve tried using it on my X1 yoga, but nothing happens. It’s super frustrating because I need it for my work!
short_description: Touchscreen pen on laptop not responding
description: Hey, so my touchscreen pen isn’t working at all. I’ve tried using it on my X1 yoga, but nothing happens. It’s super frustrating because I need it for my work!
